title: Asparagus Fish
excerpt: We generally eat too little fish in this beautiful country of ours. The availability and quality of frozen fish is good. The dish can be used as a main course or a starter. People think you've gone to a lot of trouble and actually it's a one-dish meal. YOU NEED: …
html:
We generally eat too little fish in this beautiful country of ours. The availability and quality of frozen fish is good. The dish can be used as a main course or a starter. People think you've gone to a lot of trouble and actually it's a one-dish meal.

 

YOU NEED:

  • 6 hake/stockfish portions
  • 1 tin or bottle of asparagus (keep the water they come in)
  • 250 ml sour cream
  • 250 ml white wine
  • 125 ml milk
  • 1 packet mushroom soup powder
  • 250 ml grated cheese
  • 10 ml mustard
  • 125 ml water
  • fish spice or salt and pepper

NOW:

  1. grease an oven dish and lay your fish in the dish
  2. season with your fish spice or with salt and pepper
  3. lay the asparagus on top of the fish
  4. mix the mushroom soup, the asparagus liquid, cream, water, wine and milk together
  5. pour the mixture over the fish and asparagus
  6. cover with tinfoil and bake for 15 min at 180 degrees Celsius
  7. remove the foil and scatter cheese over (you can sprinkle as much cheese as you like over the fish)
  8. now bake for another 15 min uncovered

Serve the fish deliciousness with vegetables, mashed potatoes or a fresh salad.
